title: Évangéline region (Prince Edward Island) - Canada.ca
content:
## Évangéline region Prince Edward Island

## Évangéline region Prince Edward Island
The Évangéline region has beaches, music and community festivals. There are many Francophone organizations and services in the area. This region, located on an island, offers a diverse, inclusive and dynamic community.
Where is the Évangéline region?

## Watch: Living in  Évangéline
Learn more about the community.
This video is also available in HD on YouTube where you can leave a comment, share it on your social network or embed it into your site.
Listen to the experience of two immigrants and their arrival in their new community.
“I really encourage people who want to live in a diverse, French, welcoming, and safe environment to come settle here in the Évangéline Region.” – Adil
An English transcription of the episode is available below.
Listen to more episodes of “My new home”.
